[2018-06-17 10:08] mqp: that's no less total damage
[2018-06-17 10:09] _sakuya (Sakuya): I think what i was scared of here was that id end up getting into the phase where i have to stop attack production and make just defenses

[2018-06-17 10:09] _sakuya (Sakuya): and then would get stuck on only 2 redeemers
[2018-06-17 10:10] mqp: consider that if you buy a third redeemer and it holds every turn, it's like a really really expensive infusion grid that makes 6 gauss charges for your opponent
[2018-06-17 10:10] mqp: redeemer is for clicking

[2018-06-17 10:10] mqp: with redeemer, you should expect to "pause" getting attack when the charges come in
[2018-06-17 10:10] mqp: that's just the price you pay for getting 3 attack so cheap earlier
[2018-06-17 10:11] mqp: it doesn't mean you are behind, you can get more attack later when you're not under so much pressure anymore
